key_phrases: Net debt at the end of the quarter was at INR501 crores, much lower than INR1,139 crores
Debt equity ratio at the end of the quarter was 0.05
despite a 9% drop on the top line, we have still been able to post a 12% growth in our PAT
we are not going to discount our products to win market share
credit rating agencies like ICRA and CARE have upgraded Ashok Leyland rating from AA to AA+
